message:
chore(audit): record batch 425 (unsafe FFI, math/stats, lock ordering)

Unsafe FFI audit: epoll, kqueue, io_uring reactor + fs/uring + process
— all fd handling correct, libc returns checked, ManuallyDrop prevents
double-close, BorrowedFd lifetimes valid.

Math/statistics audit: adaptive_hedge Peak-EWMA (correct decay),
spectral_health (all 10 indicators correct), conformal (quantile rank
formula correct), raptorq/linalg (GF256 elimination correct),
progress_certificate (Azuma+Freedman bounds correct signs/directions).

Lock ordering audit: 20+ files across channel/sync/service/messaging
— no lock ordering violations found. Buffer lock order documented.

Grand total: 35 bugs fixed, 195+ files audited, ~260K+ lines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
